changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: UPDATE organization_subscriptions SET next_due_date = DATE_ADD(starts_at, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) WHERE next_due_date IS NULL AND billing_cycle = 'MONTHLY' AND starts_at IS NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: UPDATE organization_subscriptions SET next_due_date = DATE_ADD(starts_at, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) WHERE next_due_date IS NULL AND billing_cycle = 'YEARLY' AND starts_at IS NOT NULL;
